# `tax` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `TaxCalculation`

```prisma
model TaxCalculation {
  id              String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId          String
  year            Int
  regime          String? // 'standard', 'new', 'old', 'single', 'married'
  country         String    @default("India")
  totalIncome     Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  totalExpense    Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  netProfit       Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  taxableIncome   Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  estimatedTax    Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  taxRate         Decimal   @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  deductions      Decimal   @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  currency        String    @default("INR")
  notes           String?
  metadata        Json?
  clientRequestId String?   @unique
  syncStatus      String    @default("synced")
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt       DateTime?
  user            User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([year])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@map("tax_calculations")
  @@schema("public")
}
```
